item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A good, and in-character use of an ethics committee proclamation to explain -why- the anomaly is contained the way it is.

+1.

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Replying to indicate I've cleared up a few elements in the ConProcs to make it more clear that the impetus behind the group housing is "good intentions" rather than a reality of the containment: Whoever is writing these is hopeful we can free this person from their loop and let them have quality of life that doesn't yield a death every 8 hours.

That might not still be clear, but it's at least more clear than it was before.

item.title: YEet
item.content:encoded: This entire article was one big bruh moment. Makes you wonder, will Royce ever really get out? Makes me kind of sad because through those research logs you can see that all those -1 instances are just people down at heart, dealing with being stuck in a fucking break room. +1.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Hello and welcome to 4805, "Utilitarian".

Here I had hoped to highlight a well-intentioned but somewhat powerless Foundation backdropped against a soft tragedy they had to watch play out over and over again.

Some background
– hide block

While the story is obviously made up, the person this is based on was a very real influence in my young life and showed me the ultimate examples a person can give to put their family and the future above themselves. So, cheers to you, friend, wherever you are.
